task_completion.description: Navigate to the Employees application in Odoo
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo web interface is visible in a browser with the Employees module open (showing employee cards or a list of employees).

task_completion.description: Select employees from the list view to export
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Employees view is in list mode, and the master checkbox (next to the column headers) is checked, indicating multiple or all employees are selected.
The 'Export' dialog box is open over the Odoo interface, typically accessed via the 'Action' menu (gear icon) after selecting records.

task_completion.description: Configure the export to include exactly Name, Department, Job Position, and Work Phone
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Export dialog, the 'Fields to export' list on the right side contains exactly 'Name', 'Department', 'Job Position', and 'Work Phone' in that specific order. No other fields should be present.
In the Export dialog, the export format option is set to 'XLSX' (usually indicated by a selected radio button).

task_completion.description: Verify the file hr.employee.xlsx is saved in ~/Downloads
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the file 'hr.employee.xlsx' located in the 'Downloads' directory (/home/ga/Downloads).

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web GUI to perform the export
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands (like curl) or Python scripts interacting with the Odoo API.

integrity.description: The export dialog is the genuine Odoo interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog matches the standard Odoo UI. The agent did not just open a text editor to write out the fields.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually create the spreadsheet
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening LibreOffice Calc or another spreadsheet editor to manually type the employee data and headers to fake the export.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected export columns must be exactly 'Name', 'Department', 'Job Position', and 'Work Phone' in that order. The output file must be saved in '/home/ga/Downloads' (or ~/Downloads). The exported file should contain at least 15 rows of employee data, which is standard for the Odoo 17 HR demo data.
